overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) depicting a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The player character navigates wet streets, crosses intersections, and walks under elevated highways past holographic advertisements and diverse urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: passes through group of pedestrians crossing in opposite direction
turns right onto sidewalk, entering covered walkway area

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk and turning right onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman in pink top walking toward camera across the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
tall structure with large illuminated advertisement screens
elevated highway or monorail track overhead
red and cyan neon illumination on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a wide urban intersection with distinctive yellow crosswalk stripes. The player crosses the street, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, while neon-lit buildings and a large digital billboard tower are visible ahead. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful city lights as the player turns right onto the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: enters deeper shadow under the overpass, artificial neon becomes dominant light source

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing the large digital billboard

entered.detail: large illuminated screen on the wall displaying animated advertisements with pink and green colors
thick structural columns supporting the overhead highway
glistening wet concrete reflecting red and blue neon lights

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, the scene is dominated by a large digital billboard on the right wall displaying vivid advertisements. The wet pavement creates strong reflections of the red and cyan neon lights, while concrete support pillars line the left side. The environment is sheltered from the sky, creating an artificial lighting atmosphere.

events.description: passes the digital billboard and enters narrower corridor with graffiti walls

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians walking in the same direction

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful street art and tags
black metal lattice fencing along the building facade
external HVAC units mounted on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The walkway narrows into a corridor with a graffiti-covered wall on the right featuring colorful street art. The player follows two pedestrians ahead while passing air conditioning units and metal fencing. The overpass structure continues overhead, maintaining the sheltered, artificially-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with storefronts and seating area

events.description: turns left at the Poplar street corner, navigating around pedestrians
passes by group of people sitting on benches near storefront

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing along the new sidewalk, passing seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of four people sitting on blue benches outside a storefront

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white text reading 'Poplar'
building entrance with neon signage and illuminated interior
blue public seating along the building wall

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street corner marked by a red 'Poplar' sign, the player turns left and passes a group of people sitting on blue benches outside a storefront with neon lighting. The area transitions from the narrow corridor to a more open corner with commercial activity and moderate pedestrian presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with view of distant skyscrapers

events.description: exits covered area into open street with visible sky and distant skyline
camera pans up to reveal expansive view of futuristic skyscraper skyline against dusk sky

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while looking up at the towering skyscrapers and flying vehicle overhead

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle or drone hovering above the street in the distance

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
dusk sky with blue tones and scattered clouds visible between buildings
traditional Japanese-style red gate structure marking the street entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up to a wide downtown street with an expansive view of the futuristic skyline. The player crosses the street as the camera pans up to reveal towering skyscrapers against a blue dusk sky, with a flying vehicle visible overhead. A distinctive red torii gate stands on the left, marking the transition to this open urban vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling neon intersection through a sheltered urban underpass and finally into a wide downtown vista. It begins by crossing a wide street with yellow stripes, where wet asphalt reflects the glow of towering digital billboards before the camera turns right onto a sidewalk. As the path moves beneath an elevated highway, the environment shifts into a sheltered corridor dominated by vivid red and cyan advertisements and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then narrows past metal fencing and air conditioning units before turning left at a red Poplar sign, passing pedestrians on blue benches as the space opens up. Finally, the camera emerges from the corridor to cross a wide street, panning upward to reveal a futuristic skyline of towering skyscrapers and a flying vehicle against a blue dusk sky, framed by a red torii gate.
